_publications._publicationTitle: Pharmacogenomic Synthetic Lethal Screens Reveal Hidden Vulnerabilities and New Therapeutic Approaches for Treatment of NF1-Associated Tumors.
_publications._context: For the patient-derived xenograft (PDX) MPNST model, tumor tissue was implanted subcutaneously directly into NOD.Cg-Prkdcscid Il2rgtm1Wjl/SzJ mice

basicInfo.description: MPNST patient-derived xenograft implanted subcutaneously in NSG mice; used for pharmacogenomic synthetic lethal screens to identify novel treatment vulnerabilities
